title: ouratea macrostachys
intro: Ouratea macrostachys, also known as the "Palo Santo," is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Ochnaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ouratea macrostachys include relief from fever, digestive issues, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Ouratea macrostachys include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
